strap: Aberdeen Digital draws £203m of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,037 grants, anchored by Aberdeen (52%), Robert Gordon University (17%), with Total E&P Uk on the industrial side. 5 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £41m UKRI per spin-out.
